name: PayPal Cashback Mastercard®

earning_rates.notes: 3% cash back when checking out with PayPal
2% cash back on all other purchases

other_benefits.name: Mastercard benefits
other_benefits.description: Standard Mastercard benefits including fraud protection and purchase security

other_benefits.name: PayPal integration
other_benefits.description: Seamless integration with PayPal balance and checkout

notes: Synchrony-issued version of PayPal Cashback Mastercard. Distinct from the Chase-issued PayPal Mastercard. Best for heavy PayPal users who want elevated cash back on PayPal transactions. Cash back as statement credit.
